title: dianthus lindbergii
intro: Dianthus lindbergii, also known as Lindberg's pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Dianthus lindbergii can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is sometimes used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and soothing properties.
